fields.description:
## Why
Complete the contract vocabulary the prompt model reuses. Lowest-risk, built right after the
skeleton so the contract surface is fully exercised before prompts adopt it.

## What
- Add input/output schema names + description to the 7 remaining ops in
  `src/rebar/llm/workflow/steps.py` (`fetch_commits`, `fetch_epic_graph`, `render_context`,
  `gate`, `comment_verdict`, `tag`, `set_fields`).
- Author + register each op's INPUT *and* OUTPUT schema (2020-12) in `src/rebar/schemas/` (the OUTPUT schema is what AC2's per-op shape test checks; do not author input-only).
- A registry-coverage test asserts EVERY registered step has a contract (mirrors the existing
  schema coverage-guard pattern).

## Scope
In: contracts for all scripted ops + their input schemas + coverage test. Out: prompts, MCP.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All 8 ops declare input+output+description; a test FAILS if any registered op lacks a contract.
- [ ] Each op's declared output schema matches what it actually returns (per-op output-shape test).
- [ ] Input schemas are 2020-12 and resolve through the registry.
- [ ] Input schemas REJECT malformed input (a negative test), not only accept valid input.
